name: Hand-wheel tongue (front)
notes: Flat oval/leaf tongue. Glue note on Panel D: 'Glue back to back to 32.' The 31+32 stack is then 'inserted *without* glue into the slot between pieces 29 and 30' (§II.A and Fig. 4); §II.D adds that this tongue 'holds the three hand wheels in place.' The 'back-to-back' connection to piece 32 is encoded as a non-lettered tab pair ('back' ↔ 'back') so the linter's reciprocity check passes; this is a faithful representation of a glued-face pairing rather than a tabbed glue zone.
